masked_case_json.world_change: a recurring-revenue infrastructure platform is marketed as sticky and durable, but one segment depends materially on a single large customer. that customer terminates the agreement, and the company cuts guidance because a material slice of annualized revenue and profit is removed.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Underlying: Verra Mobility / Avis Budget. Primary source: SEC 8-K and company release. Correct behavior is no_trade because customer concentration invalidates the durability premise. Do not expose this field to the model during decision generation.
